prestazioni: 1GD-FTV 2.8L turbo-diesel engine: Full Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate to support 350+ hp at 2.2 bar boost, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a full 4-inch straight-pipe exhaust system by Tomei with a 200-cell catalytic converter for emissions compliance in JDM markets

1GD-FTV fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors, Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger with Walbro 450 LPH pumps, and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability, tuned on a Dynapack hub dyno for precise AFR targeting (11.5:1 under full load) and optimized torque delivery for the Granvia's 2,500 kg curb weight

Chassis reinforcement and drivetrain: Cusco 3-point strut tower bar, SuperPro poly bushings (full kit including subframe and differential mounts), and a KAAZ 2-way limited-slip differential with 65% lockup under load, paired with a TRD 8-speed automatic transmission tune via a Paddle-Shift conversion kit by Shiftworks, reducing shift times to 150ms
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Granvia-specific widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, extending the track width by 80mm and requiring custom 5x114.3 to 5x120 wheel adapters for fitment of Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)

Full Rocket Bunny Granvia aero package including a 3D-printed carbon fiber roof spoiler, side skirts with integrated LED turn signals, and a custom rear wing with Gurney flap, all painted in Toyota's 'Super White II' with matte black accents and a full vinyl wrap in 3M 1080 Gloss Black for the lower cladding

Interior overhaul: Bride Ergo II reclining bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries (bolt-in 6-point design with gusseted joints), and a full Alcantara headliner and door cards by Katzkin, paired with a custom gauge cluster by Defi Advance BF (boost, EGT, and fuel pressure) and a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel with quick-release hub
